name: qmd
description: Keyless local vector search over the memory files via tobi/qmd. File-search only.
ramWarning: qmd downloads ~0.3-2 GB of GGUF models and holds them in RAM per query; needs Node >= 22 and the qmd binary on PATH.
note: The exemplar third-party adapter: file-space only; memory-space queries fall to the files floor.
